text: Standing just outside a room with glass walls, I sense the transition between the quiet neutrality of institutional corridors and a more vibrant, purposeful interior. The clean signage and polished surfaces invoke a feeling of anticipation—I'm on the threshold of discovery, perhaps about to learn something new. The sterile, almost clinical atmosphere contrasts with the creative energy promised beyond the glass. I am alert and curious, attuned to the subtle expectations places like this seem to create in me.
